description: Edge cases that should NOT be suppressed by parameterized query detection

expected.notes: Template literal with interpolation — ${table} makes the query dynamic, $1 placeholder does not help
Dynamic variable as first arg — query built via concatenation then passed to client.query
Classic string concatenation into client.query — no parameterization
Concatenation even though query mentions OR — no bind params at all
sequelize.query with raw SQL concatenation — ORM raw entry point is not suppressed
noise: secondary res.json flow from sequelize function
